what_went_well: PHPStan level 8 passes with zero errors
PHP CS Fixer passes with zero violations
503/504 tests pass (1 pre-existing timing failure in DiscoveryControllerCest unrelated to our changes)
Full bilingual translations (EN + UK) added for all new UI strings
Bot token masked in edit form (password field, never echoed back)

deviations_from_spec: 12.3: Activity count is implemented as 'recently active chats (24h)' stat rather than a sparkline chart — sparkline requires time-series data not available in current schema
12.4: Chat detail link not implemented — requires separate investigation of available data sources
